messages.subject: [OGRUG] Need help with R Serve installing gplots
messages.subject_clean: [OGRUG] Need help with R Serve installing gplots
messages.body_plain:
Hi,

I am trying to setup rserve on a CENTOS server.

Everything so far seems to be going well...

However, when I go to run:

Install.packages("gplots")

It prompts me for a mirror, I choose one, then I get an error saying:

Package 'gplots' is not available (for R version 2.15.2)

What can I do?

Thanks,

D.



[D2L logo]
Derek J.P. Serianni
Senior Technical Account Manager
Desire2Learn Incorporated

messages.subject: [OGRUG] Need help with R Serve installing gplots
messages.subject_clean: [OGRUG] Need help with R Serve installing gplots
messages.body_plain:
Can you get a newer version of R either from packages or from sources?
Otherwise try to compile an older version of gplots from sources the
archives are here http://cran.r-project.org/src/contrib/Archive/gplots/

--
Oscar Cassetti
